option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Home Registration Program Directions Flyer

Preliminary Program

The detailed program will be announced after the abstract submission deadline (April 8, 2026). Below is a preliminary overview of the schedule.

Day 1 – June 5, 2026 (Full Day)

Morning Opening Remarks
Welcome address and opening of the 2nd Greater Bay Area Physical Science Young Scientist Forum.
Morning Plenary Talk
Speaker to be announced
Details will be announced after abstract submission.
Morning –
Afternoon 		Parallel Sessions
Invited talks covering physical sciences, materials science, quantum technologies, energy and environmental solutions, and interdisciplinary topics.
Noon Lunch
Lunch will be provided for all participants.
Evening Dinner
Dinner will be provided for all participants.

Day 2 – June 6, 2026 (Full Day)

Morning Plenary Talk
Speaker to be announced
Details will be announced after abstract submission.
Morning –
Afternoon 		Parallel Sessions
Invited talks covering physical sciences, materials science, quantum technologies, energy and environmental solutions, and interdisciplinary topics.
Noon Lunch
Lunch will be provided for all participants.
© Forum 2026 Organizing Committee  |  Design by Mike Pierce
